itunes_results.name: Geopolitics Daily — News
itunes_results.note: Current events news aggregator — not an educational streak app teaching geopolitical theory (Mackinder, Mahan, Spykman, Mearsheimer)

itunes_results.name: Council on Foreign Relations
itunes_results.note: Think-tank publication access — not a structured daily lessons app with gamification

daily_geopolitics_fundamentals_streak.gap_note: 34.7M combined community. No app teaches geopolitical theory (Heartland Theory, Rimland, Sea Power) with daily bite-sized lessons. Mackinder's pivot area, Spykman's rimland, Mearsheimer's offensive realism — concepts shaping every global decision but no streak app explains them. Business strategists and students would pay for this.

itunes_results.name: Foreign Policy Magazine
itunes_results.note: Premium news magazine — not a structured daily learning app on US-China-Russia dynamics

itunes_results.name: The Economist
itunes_results.note: General news subscription — not a focused educational streak app on great power competition

daily_great_power_competition_streak.gap_note: US-China-Russia triangle is the defining geopolitical story of the 21st century. 32.9M community. No app delivers daily lessons: Taiwan Strait flashpoints, Arctic sovereignty claims, Belt and Road leverage, SWIFT weaponization, chip war escalation ladders. Professionals in finance, policy, and tech actively seek this literacy. Zero streak format competitors.

itunes_results.name: Cold War History — The Documentary
itunes_results.note: Documentary streaming access — not a daily educational streak app with structured curriculum

itunes_results.name: KGB Files — Secret History
itunes_results.note: Static ebook/article collection — no gamification, no streak mechanic, no curriculum

daily_cold_war_proxy_streak.gap_note: 49.7M combined community. Proxy wars shaped the modern world: Korea, Vietnam, Angola, Mozambique, Nicaragua, Afghanistan. Each theatre has unique CIA/KGB operations, political decisions, and long-term consequences explaining today's geopolitical map. No streak app synthesizes these conflicts as teachable lessons with modern relevance.

itunes_results.name: Nuclear War Simulator
itunes_results.note: Simulation game — not an educational app teaching deterrence theory, MAD, first-strike calculus

itunes_results.name: Countdown to Zero
itunes_results.note: Anti-nuclear advocacy app — not a structured lessons app covering deterrence theory and nuclear history

daily_nuclear_strategy_streak.gap_note: 17.1M community. Deterrence theory (MAD, NUTS, minimum deterrence, extended deterrence, first-use vs no-first-use) is genuinely complex yet critically important. 1962 Cuban Missile Crisis, 1983 Able Archer near-miss, Pakistan-India nuclear dynamics, North Korea escalation ladders — no streak app teaches the decision trees policymakers actually face.

itunes_results.name: Diplomacy (board game companion)
itunes_results.note: Board game companion — not a historical diplomacy education app

itunes_results.name: History of Diplomacy — Podcast
itunes_results.note: Audio podcast app — not a structured daily streak app with quizzes and progress tracking

daily_diplomacy_history_streak.gap_note: 19.7M community. Congress of Vienna (1815), Treaty of Westphalia (1648), Peace of Paris (1783), Yalta (1945), Camp David (1978) — each a masterclass in negotiation, power balancing, and statecraft. No streak app teaches diplomatic history as daily 5-minute lessons. Business negotiators and policy wonks are an obvious premium segment.

itunes_results.name: Middle East Eye
itunes_results.note: News outlet app — not an educational app teaching Sykes-Picot, Balfour, Arab-Israeli conflict structure

itunes_results.name: Al Jazeera English
itunes_results.note: News streaming app — not a structured educational streak app on Middle East geopolitics

daily_middle_east_geopolitics_streak.gap_note: 49M community. Sykes-Picot line, Balfour Declaration, 1979 Iranian Revolution, Oslo Accords failures, petrodollar recycling, Sunni-Shia proxy conflict — all deeply connected yet rarely taught systematically. No streak app provides daily structured lessons connecting colonial history to today's headlines. High engagement potential given media saturation of the topic.

itunes_results.name: Reuters Business News
itunes_results.note: News app — not educational streak app teaching sanctions architecture, SWIFT exclusion, petrodollar mechanics

itunes_results.name: Bloomberg
itunes_results.note: Financial news terminal — not a daily lessons app teaching economic coercion as geopolitical tool

daily_economic_statecraft_streak.gap_note: 35.5M community. Economic statecraft — SWIFT weaponization, secondary sanctions, export controls, currency swap lines, BIS settlement exclusion — is now the primary tool of great power conflict yet zero apps teach it as a curriculum. Finance professionals, IR students, and business strategists face this knowledge gap daily. Premium willingness-to-pay is high.

itunes_results.name: Decolonize This Place
itunes_results.note: Advocacy/activism app — not a structured historical streak app explaining how colonial borders created modern conflicts

itunes_results.name: History of Africa
itunes_results.note: Static article collection — no gamification, no streak mechanic, no modern relevance tracking

daily_colonial_legacy_streak.gap_note: 18.9M community. Berlin Conference (1884), Scramble for Africa, mandate system, resource extraction legacies — virtually every active conflict zone traces directly to colonial-era border drawing. No streak app teaches these causal chains systematically. Appeals to policy students, NGO workers, journalists, and globally curious professionals.

itunes_results.name: Spy Museum App
itunes_results.note: Museum companion app — physical location content, not a standalone daily lessons streak app

itunes_results.name: The Intelligence Podcast (CIA)
itunes_results.note: Audio podcast app — not a structured gamified streak app with quizzes and progress tracking

daily_intelligence_agencies_streak.gap_note: 18.6M community. CIA Bay of Pigs, KGB Operation RYAN, MOSSAD Operation Wrath of God, MI6 and Oleg Gordievsky — intelligence operations are documented, educational, and fascinating. HUMINT vs SIGINT vs OSINT trade-offs, tradecraft basics, historical failures (Ames, Hanssen) — zero streak apps teach this curriculum. True crime + history crossover audience is massive.

itunes_results.name: International Law Guide
itunes_results.note: Static legal reference — not an educational daily streak app on ICJ, ICC, UN charter, R2P doctrine

itunes_results.name: Legal Definitions
itunes_results.note: General legal dictionary — not focused on international law, treaties, or global governance

daily_international_law_streak.gap_note: 34.5M community. UN Charter Article 51 self-defense, ICJ vs ICC jurisdiction, Responsibility to Protect doctrine, Law of the Sea (UNCLOS), WTO dispute resolution — these govern real-world conflicts but remain opaque even to educated people. No streak app demystifies international law with daily bite-sized lessons tied to current events. Law students, journalists, and policy professionals are ideal users.
